reglas.title: How to play
reglas.subtitle: Everything you need to know to win the pool.

exact.label: Exact score
exact.desc: You get the exact match score. E.g.: you predict 2–1 and the final result is 2–1.

winnerDiff.label: Winner and exact difference
winnerDiff.desc: You get the winner (or draw) and the exact goal difference, but not the score. E.g.: you predict 2–0, the result is 3–1 (home wins by 2 goals).

winner.label: Correct winner
winner.desc: You get who wins (or that it will be a draw) but not the score or difference. E.g.: you predict 2–0, the result is 3–0.

noAcierto.label: No points
noAcierto.desc: The winner you predicted doesn't match the actual result.

noPrediccion.label: No prediction
noPrediccion.desc: If you don't register a prediction before the match starts, you score 0 points for that match.

knockout.title: ⚡ Knockout Rounds
knockout.intro: In knockout rounds the Absolute Winner rule applies. The points scale (+3, +2, +1) works the same as in groups, but only if you first get who advances.

ties.title: Draws after 120 min
ties.desc: If you predict a draw, the app will ask you to choose which team advances to the next round (as if it were penalties). That choice is part of your prediction.

goldenRule.title: The Golden Rule: the qualifier rules
goldenRule.desc1: If you get the wrong team to advance,
goldenRule.desc2: , regardless of how many goals you predicted correctly.

ifCorrect.title: If you get the qualifier right…
ifCorrect.desc: The normal scale applies (+3 exact · +2 difference · +1 qualifier only) comparing your goals against the actual score in 90/120 minutes.

tiebreak.title: 🏆 Tiebreaker criteria
tiebreak.intro: If two or more players have the same total points, the tiebreaker is applied in this order:

r1.title: Most exact scores (+3)
r1.desc: Whoever got the most exact scorelines throughout the tournament.

r2.title: Most correct winners (+1)
r2.desc: Whoever correctly predicted the match outcome (1X2) the most times.

r3.title: Predicted goals closest to real
r3.desc: The sum of the absolute difference between predicted and actual goals across all matches. Less difference = better position.

r4.title: Registration order
r4.desc: In case of a complete tie, priority goes to whoever registered first on the platform.

phases.title: 📅 Tournament phases
phases.disclaimer: The deadline to register or edit a prediction is the exact moment of kick-off for each match.

p1.desc: Predict the results of all 48 matches in the first phase.

p2.desc: The 32 qualified teams compete in knockout rounds.
